genre_refs: New York Post tabloid front page
description: A recreated/screenshotted New York Post tabloid front page used as a political attack graphic. At the top is the iconic black-and-white 'NEW YORK POST' masthead with a small American flag at left and a 'Page Six' logo at right; a thin pink dateline bar reads 'MONDAY, MAY 4, 2026 / Mostly sunny, 71 / Weather: P. 18 / LATE CITY FINAL / nypost.com / $2.00'. The dominant element is the enormous white all-caps headline 'BUTCHERED'. To the right in bold white-on-black blocks: 'Illegal migrant slaughters two women in LI, including mom of three: cops'. The left/center features a large mugshot-style photo of a young man (the accused) with a goatee, neutral expression, wearing what appears to be a white detention garment. Inset at lower right is a photo of a Wendy's restaurant exterior, with a caption identifying the suspect Rony Yahir Alvarenga Rivera, 22, of El Salvador, and a red 'FULL STORY: SEE PAGES 4-7' flag. The propaganda technique is fear/outrage amplification linking violent crime to illegal immigration and (per the tweet) to Democrats and sanctuary policies. Target audience: the administration's base, intended to stoke anti-immigration sentiment and assign political blame.
notable_text: NEW YORK POST / BUTCHERED / Illegal migrant slaughters two women in LI, including mom of three: cops / FULL STORY: SEE PAGES 4-7
